ham.subject: Out of Office: [Name] will be away
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I will be out of the office from 20th to 24th April, returning on 25th. I will have limited access to email during this period. For any urgent matters, please reach out to [Colleague] at colleague@example.com.

Thank you.

Best,
[Name]

spam.subject: URGENT: QuickBooks Invoice #987654 – Immediate Payment Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have generated a QuickBooks invoice for your recent purchase. Please review the attached invoice and make payment within 24 hours to avoid service interruption.

View and confirm your payment here: <URL>

If payment is not received, your account will be suspended and services may be discontinued.

For security, verify your account by clicking the link above.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Best regards,
QuickBooks Support Team
